overall.description: First-person exploration of a futuristic cyberpunk bar interior with intense green neon lighting, industrial metal architecture, and holographic displays. The player character walks through narrow corridors and open lounge areas of the 'Afterlife' establishment, passing various NPCs in this high-fidelity game engine scene.

standing near glass wall wearing tank top

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow, neon-lit entry corridor with reflective glass walls on the right and industrial ceiling pipes overhead. The floor features illuminated green grating, and several NPCs are seated or standing along the passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: central lounge with holographic display tanks

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open lounge area with central holographic display tanks

agents.ego_description: entering the main lounge area and approaching the central holographic displays

distinctive circular illuminated ceiling fixture with grid pattern
long bar counter with stools along the left wall
multiple digital screens displaying images mounted on the left wall
metal safety railing along the edge of the bar area

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the narrow corridor into a spacious open lounge dominated by large cylindrical holographic display tanks containing glowing figures. The area features a distinctive circular grid ceiling fixture, bar counters along the walls, and groups of NPCs standing near the displays.

scene_state.functional_zone: Afterlife bar main area with prominent neon signage

long curved bar counter with neon edge lighting on the right side
poster with 'HOMICIDE' text visible on the left wall
illuminated arrow sign pointing toward the exit on the right wall
area with NPCs seated at tables along the right side

segments.scene_description: Moving through the main Afterlife bar area, passing under the prominent illuminated signage. The space features extensive bar counters with neon edging, holographic display tanks, and patrons seated at tables. A distinctive 'HOMICIDE' poster is visible on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear service corridors with steam vents and maintenance areas

agents.ego_description: proceeding through darker rear corridors toward a steamy maintenance area

segments.scene_description: Transitioning into darker, narrower service corridors with dim blue lighting and industrial maintenance equipment. The atmosphere becomes increasingly foggy with steam vents, and the space features safety barriers, industrial barrels, and distant red emergency lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk lounge that gradually descends into a dim, industrial service area. It begins by gliding through a narrow entry corridor defined by reflective glass walls and illuminated green floor grating beneath industrial ceiling pipes. As the passage opens up, the scene expands into a spacious lounge dominated by large cylindrical holographic display tanks and a circular grid ceiling fixture. The camera then moves deeper into the main bar area, passing under prominent illuminated signage and neon-edged counters before gliding past a HOMICIDE poster on the left wall. Finally, the atmosphere shifts as the camera turns away from the crowd and enters darker service corridors, where the bright green glow is replaced by dim blue lighting, steam vents, and distant red emergency signals.
